violations.text: Menu is lacking allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The sink used for food preparation and the ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed.Observed air breaks. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
